query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Minnesota Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed browser-readable official MDE-ORG county and district routes, county member pages, district detail leaves, and the Special Education Director contact list on 2026-06-25.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official description page is live with title `Schools and Organizations (MDE-ORG)` and still describes MDE-ORG as a searchable database.

The public `Schools and Districts` page is browser-readable on the official host and exposes district listings, a `List of Districts and Schools`, a `Superintendents/Directors for School Districts and Charter Schools` list, and a `Special Education Directors` contact list with an extract link.
The public `Minnesota Counties` page explicitly says users can click on a county name to view all organizations located within that county and lists all 87 counties on the official host.

A county member page like `Aitkin County` publicly enumerates organizations within that county, including district members such as `Aitkin Public School District`, `Hill City Public School District`, and `McGregor Public School District`.
A district detail page like `Aitkin Public School District 0001-01` preserves superintendent name, email, phone, website, physical address, and explicit county membership on the official host.

The public `Special Education Director` contact list preserves organization name, email, and phone for district special-education contacts on the official host, including `Aitkin Public School District`.

samples.sample_name: Minnesota MDE-ORG raw root remains unstable
samples.evidence_snippet: The raw MDE-ORG root still flaps into `validate.perfdrive.com` under bounded fetch, but the browser-reviewed child routes above remain publicly readable and are strong enough for county-grade routing.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 the dedicated first-party Minnesota Disability Law Center page and the Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid homepage.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Minnesota Disability Law Center page states that MDLC of Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid is the federally designated Protection and Advocacy agency for people with disabilities in the state of Minnesota.
The homepage preserves a live statewide Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid intake route plus direct Minnesota Disability Law Center contact routing.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-23 the authoritative Parent Center Hub Minnesota state leaf after PACER first-party pages no longer preserved explicit PTI designation text.

samples.sample_name: Parent Center Hub Minnesota PTI listing
samples.evidence_snippet: Minnesota PTI. PACER Center, Inc. 8161 Normandale Boulevard Bloomington, MN 55437-1044 (952) 838-9000 | (888) 248-0822 (National) http://www.pacer.org

query_basis: Reviewed first-party statewide legal-aid access source.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid homepage preserves a first-party statewide legal-aid access route, online intake, phone intake, and Minnesota Disability Law Center contact routing.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-25 the saved DHS disability-services replacements plus the exact named successor county/tribal/state directory route.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-25 bounded official Minnesota DHS county-and-tribal surfaces. The saved disability-services replacement URLs still return official DHS 404 pages, including https://mn.gov/dhs/people-we-serve/adults/services/disability-services/county-and-tribal-offices/. The official DHS shell also exposes an exact successor contact route at https://mn.gov/dhs/people-we-serve/adults/health-care/health-care-programs/contact-us/county-tribal-state-offices.jsp labeled `Minnesota Health Care Program county, Tribal and state directory`, but a fresh exact recheck showed that successor returning HTTP 302 into `validate.perfdrive.com` / `Radware Bot Manager Captcha`. Minnesota therefore still lacks a reviewable county-grade county/tribal office contract on public first-party DHS surfaces.

samples.evidence_snippet: The saved replacement now returns HTTP 404 with title `404 / Minnesota Department of Human Services` rather than a public local-office directory.

The exact DHS successor labeled `Minnesota Health Care Program county, Tribal and state directory` redirects into `validate.perfdrive.com` / `Radware Bot Manager Captcha` instead of yielding a public office directory.
The old `.jsp` county-and-tribal-offices path remains stale and no longer preserves a reviewed local-office contract.
